goals.title: Foundation
goals.objective: 完善业务状态与本地持久化，让采集、确认、画像、方案、通知、隐私开关跨刷新保留并可重置
goals.evidence: Implemented src/lib/liji/persistence.ts, localStorage-backed workspace state in src/features/liji/liji-app.tsx, reset UI, and tests/liji/persistence.test.ts. Verification: npm run lint, npm run typecheck, npm run test -- --run tests/liji/persistence.test.ts all passed.

goals.title: Workflow
goals.objective: 补齐核心业务闭环：采集确认生成日程/账单/记忆，方案确认归档，提醒确认和升级日志可操作
goals.evidence: Implemented src/lib/liji/workflow.ts and tests/liji/workflow.test.ts. UI now confirms captures through workflow rules, writes event/bill/transaction/memory buckets, confirms/bookmarks plans, acknowledges Level 1 events, and confirms notification logs. Verification: npm run lint, npm run typecheck, npm run test -- --run tests/liji/workflow.test.ts all passed.

goals.title: Readiness
goals.objective: 补齐交付准备：接口契约、测试覆盖、README/演示说明、Playwright 关键路径
goals.evidence: Added docs/api-contract.md, README business workflow notes, accessibility labels for workflow actions, and expanded e2e/liji.spec.ts to cover plan confirmation persistence and Level 1 reminder acknowledgement. Verification: npm run lint, npm run typecheck, npm run test (9 files/21 tests), npm run e2e (8 tests) all passed.

goals.title: Gate
goals.objective: 运行 ai-slop-cleaner 风格自检、验证套件、codereview，修复阻塞项并推送远端分支
goals.evidence: Final gate complete: ai-slop-cleaner self-check removed Playwright artifacts and tightened real review findings; verification passed; codereview has no remaining blocking findings.

claudeObjective: Complete all ultragoal stories in .omc/ultragoal/plans/1782907472927-mvp-code-review-push/goals.json: G001-foundation Foundation; G002-workflow Workflow; G003-readiness Readiness; G004-gate Gate
